subcodes.first_line: O thou who art inebriated with the wine of the Covenant! That which thou didst write was perused, and likewise the photograph that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست صهبای پیمان آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید و همچنین عکسی که
subcodes.subjects: @photographs and recordings, @banishment to; life in Adrianople, @chastisement and requital
